texto: I do care. That's why I hunt them. But if you've seen what I have, then you learn to deal with the murders and disappearances. You learn to push it aside and move on. The other life isn't here anymore. This new world has its own rules. Survival of the fittest is one of them. If you're hoping for kindness and pity, don't hold your breath.
explicacao: Citação de Susanne Winnacker sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I do care. That's why I hunt them. But if you've seen what I have, then you learn to deal with th…” articula sabedoria, rationality, survival em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como survival e zombie-apocalypse.
